codeReview.summary: This verification-only feature successfully confirmed that all three precondition features (MCP server rewrite, context export formats, GitHub Action) compile together with zero errors and pass the full test suite. The handoff shows 231 tests passed (156 unit + 75 integration across 6 test targets), well exceeding the expected 180+ threshold. Both dev and release builds succeeded with zero errors (8 warnings for unused dead code, which is acceptable for future features). The commit under review (59d2de0) contains the GitHub Action implementation itself, and the cross-area verification confirmed it integrates cleanly with the MCP server and context exports.

summary: The cross-area build verification passed all requirements: cargo build succeeds with zero errors, cargo test passes 231 tests (exceeding the 170+ minimum), and no regressions were detected in existing functionality. All three preconditions (MCP server rewrite, context export formats, GitHub Action) compile and test together successfully. The validation contract assertions VAL-CROSS-002 (All new features compile and existing tests pass) is fully satisfied.
